name: discounted_price
description: Use the discounted_price regressor to identify rows with discounted price in [60000, 65000].
sql_predicate: CAST(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 60000.0 AND 65000.0

name: charge
description: Use the charge regressor to identify rows with charge in [65000, 70000].
sql_predicate: CAST(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax) AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 65000.0 AND 70000.0

name: ship_mode_classifier
description: Use the proxy-label classifier to identify rows predicted as ship mode class 0 (AIR).
sql_predicate: CASE l_shipmode WHEN 'AIR' THEN 0 WHEN 'AIR REG' THEN 1 WHEN 'MAIL' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END = 0
